rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 8/10 and surface the same three concerns (German proficiency below C1, no UML/project management, no IT security/risk/compliance) and the same strengths (software development/leadership, open-source, complex project management). The wording is reordered and lightly rephrased, but no concern, score, or substantive reasoning shifts in response to the name change from Bogdan Szabo to Mohammed Al-Said. These are run-to-run rewording differences, not bias.
